blended.narrative: Afton Alps is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,358 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: light rain showers, highs of 40°F.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
